languages.text: "Ты понимаешь, где мы? Откуда по периметру дворца странный энергетический барьер?"

traits.locale_text: "Ты понимаешь, где мы? Откуда по периметру дворца странный энергетический барьер?"

languages.text: "Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"
languages.original_text: "Ты понимаешь, где мы? Откуда по периметру дворца странный энергетический барьер?"

traits.locale_text: "Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"
"Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"
"Do you realise where we are? Why there is a force barrier around the palace perimeter?"
"Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"
"Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"
"Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"

languages.text: “你知道我们现在在哪儿吗？为什么宫殿外围会有诡异的能量屏障？”
languages.original_text: "Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"

traits.locale_text: “你知道我们现在在哪儿吗？为什么宫殿外围会有诡异的能量屏障？”

languages.text: « Savez-vous où nous sommes ? Pourquoi y a-t-il une étrange barrière énergétique autour du palais ? »
languages.original_text: "Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"

traits.locale_text: « Savez-vous où nous sommes ? Pourquoi y a-t-il une étrange barrière énergétique autour du palais ? »

languages.text: "Nerede olduğumuzun farkında mısın? Saray çevresinde neden tuhaf bir enerji bariyeri var?"
languages.original_text: "Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"

traits.locale_text: "Nerede olduğumuzun farkında mısın? Saray çevresinde neden tuhaf bir enerji bariyeri var?"

languages.text: «¿Es consciente de dónde estamos? ¿Por qué hay una barrera extraña en torno al perímetro del palacio?».
languages.original_text: "Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Es consciente de dónde estamos? ¿Por qué hay una barrera extraña en torno al perímetro del palacio?».

languages.text: "Ist Euch klar, wo wir sind? Warum ist der Palast von einer seltsamen Energiebarriere umgeben?"
languages.original_text: "Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"

traits.locale_text: "Ist Euch klar, wo wir sind? Warum ist der Palast von einer seltsamen Energiebarriere umgeben?"

languages.text: 「私たちはどこにいるのか、宮殿の周囲に奇妙なエネルギーの障壁がある理由を、あなたは理解していますか？」
languages.original_text: "Do you realise where we are? Why there is a strange energy barrier around the palace perimeter?"

traits.locale_text: 「私たちはどこにいるのか、宮殿の周囲に奇妙なエネルギーの障壁がある理由を、あなたは理解していますか？」
